idea-plugin.name: Selenium Boot
idea-plugin.description:
IntelliJ IDEA support for Selenium Boot — the zero-boilerplate, Spring-Boot-style Selenium automation framework.

Go from nothing to a running Selenium Boot test without leaving the IDE:

  • New Project wizard — scaffold a ready-to-run Maven + TestNG project: pom.xml (pinned dependency), a starter selenium-boot.yml, testng.xml, and a sample test & page object.
  • Config completion & validation — schema-backed editing for selenium-boot.yml: completion, enum validation, and inline docs for every key.
  • Run configuration — run the suite via Maven with first-class Selenium Boot knobs: config profile, config file, test filter, goals, and extra arguments.

This plugin focuses on the Selenium Boot experience specifically; it does not replace IntelliJ's built-in TestNG/JUnit run gutters or Cucumber support.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.0 — Initial release.

  • New Project wizard for Selenium Boot (Maven + TestNG) with a sample test and page object.
  • JSON-Schema-backed completion, validation, and docs for selenium-boot.yml.
  • "Selenium Boot" run/debug configuration (config profile, config file, test filter, goals).
